examples: The frigate fired a warning shot across the privateer's bows to make her heave to.
The Navy's Turkish Naval Institute is working on the design, the country's first homegrown plan for a frigate.
The country's senior admiral has ascribed Iran's success in building its first frigate to Mr Khamenei's encouragement.
The crew from the Type 23 frigate was undergoing combat training at the time.
During its deployment in the south Atlantic, the frigate travelled 35, 340 miles (57, 000km) and visited 13 ports.
